title: France wants to join the joint program of Germany and Britain on the...

description: France wants to join the joint program of Germany and Britain on the development of long-range missiles, - FT The project envisages the creation of ground-based missiles with a range of more than 2,000 km for striking targets deep in the territory of the Russian Federation. As the Financial Times writes, the idea became especially relevant after Trump canceled plans to deploy American Tomahawks in Germany. European countries fear...
description_en: France wants to join the joint program of Germany and Britain on the development of long-range missiles, - FT The project envisages the creation of ground-based missiles with a range of more than 2,000 km for striking targets deep in the territory of the Russian Federation. As the Financial Times writes, the idea became especially relevant after Trump canceled plans to deploy American Tomahawks in Germany. European countries fear...
description_uk: Франция хочет присоединиться к совместной программе Германии и Британии по разработке дальнобойных ракет, - FT Проект предусматривает создание наземных ракет с дальностью более 2000 км для ударов по целям глубоко на территории рф. Как пишет Financial Times, идея стала особенно актуальной после того, как Трамп отменил планы размещения американских Tomahawk в Германии. Европейские страны опасаются,...

title: Kyiv: Casualties reported
description: Killing Ukrainian artists is Russia's century-old tradition “On May 22, 1979, thousands gathered in Lviv to bid farewell to Volodymyr Ivasyuk, one of the most influential figures in modern Ukrainian music. Weeks earlier, the composer had disappeared under mysterious circumstances before being found dead in a forest near the city of Lviv, in what Soviet authorities declared a suicide,” writes...

description: I was with our soldiers who are being treated and undergoing rehabilitation after injuries in one of the medical institutions of the Rivne region. I talked to the defenders. They defended Ukraine in various directions - Kharkiv region, Kherson region, Dnipro region, Donetsk region, participated in the Kursk operation. Awarded soldiers with state awards. Thank you for serving and protecting our country. It is very important that the infrastructure for...
description_en: I was with our soldiers who are being treated and undergoing rehabilitation after injuries in one of the medical institutions of the Rivne region. I talked to the defenders. They defended Ukraine in various directions - Kharkiv region, Kherson region, Dnipro region, Donetsk region, participated in the Kursk operation. Awarded soldiers with state awards. Thank you for serving and protecting our country. It is very important that the infrastructure for...
description_uk: Був у наших воїнів, які лікуються та проходять реабілітацію після поранень в одному з медичних закладів Рівненщини. Поспілкувався з захисниками. Вони захищали Україну на різних напрямках – Харківщині, Херсонщині, Дніпровщині, Донеччині, брали участь у Курській операції. Відзначив воїнів державними нагородами. Дякую за службу та захист нашої країни. Дуже важливо, щоб інфраструктура для...

title: Pokrovsk: Energy infrastructure hit

title: 300 drones
description: In the meantime, more than 300 UAVs have flown to the Russian Federation to organize a riot - monitors And Russian monitoring channels are extremely pessimistic - they whine that up to three thousand drones may fly over Mother Russia in the next day.
description_en: In the meantime, more than 300 UAVs have flown to the Russian Federation to organize a riot - monitors And Russian monitoring channels are extremely pessimistic - they whine that up to three thousand drones may fly over Mother Russia in the next day.
description_uk: Тем временем устраивать гойду на рф полетели более 300 БПЛА, - мониторы А российские мониторинговые каналы источают крайний пессимизм - скулят, что в ближайшие сутки по матушке-россии может прилететь уже до трех тысяч дронов.

title: Kyiv: Today, in Slavutych, Mayor Yuriy Fomichev and Head of the Kyiv OVA,...

title_uk: Київ: Сьогодні у Славутичі міський голова Юрій Фомічов та голова Київської ОВА...
description: Today, in Slavutych, Mayor Yuriy Fomichev and Head of the Kyiv OVA, Mykola Kalashnyk, discussed the tasks needed to strengthen the city: logistics, defense, energy. It is important that the things announced during the previous working trip here are carried out, and, of course, this work should be prompt and high-quality - such that people feel it. I am grateful to everyone who works every day for the city and...
description_en: Today, in Slavutych, Mayor Yuriy Fomichev and Head of the Kyiv OVA, Mykola Kalashnyk, discussed the tasks needed to strengthen the city: logistics, defense, energy. It is important that the things announced during the previous working trip here are carried out, and, of course, this work should be prompt and high-quality - such that people feel it. I am grateful to everyone who works every day for the city and...
description_uk: Сьогодні у Славутичі з міським головою Юрієм Фомічевим і начальником Київської ОВА Миколою Калашником обговорили завдання, які потрібні для посилення міста: логістика, захист, енергетика. Важливо, що речі, озвучені під час попередньої робочої поїздки сюди, виконуються, і, звісно, робота ця має бути оперативною та якісною – такою, щоб люди це відчували. Вдячний усім, хто щодня працює для міста та...
